title: verbena dissecta f. glandulifera
intro: Verbena dissecta f. glandulifera, also known as the glandular verbena, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for individuals with gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
